arts.ttl: Birmingham City given staggering probability of promotion after Huddersfield success
arts.sum: The Red Dragons were defeated by Stevenage on home soil, meaning that Blues are now eight points clear of the Welsh outfit while also still having two league matches in hand on their rivals. With bookmakers Betfred, they consider Blues to have a staggering 98.5% chance of promotion from here after making them 1/66 to win promotion in any form this season.
